title: Section 6
content: No suit, prosecution or other legal proceedings shall be instituted except with the previous sanction of 1 [the Central Government]against any person in respect of anything done or purporting to be done in exercise of the powers conferred by sections 4 and 5.
footnote: 1 Subs. by Act 15 of 1989, s. 2,for "the Administrator" (w.e.f. 18-5-1989).
